intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps users optimize their web pages for AI search and SEO by providing actionable insights and scores. It simplifies the process of improving website visibility and performance.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Easily see all analyzed pages of your website, with the weakest ones highlighted at the top for quick attention.

highlights.title: Focused Recommendations
highlights.description: Get clear, actionable advice on the most critical areas to improve, making it easier to enhance your site's performance.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Interface
highlights.description: Switching pages now provides friendly instructions instead of error messages, improving user experience.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly copy code snippets for recommended fixes directly from the extension, turning diagnostics into easy implementations.

highlights.title: In-Page Issue Highlighting
highlights.description: Visually identify issues directly on your web page, making it easier to understand and fix problems as you analyze.

highlights.title: Enhanced Readability and SEO Checks
highlights.description: New checks for readability and SEO ensure your content is not only optimized for AI but also user-friendly.

highlights.title: Anonymous Usage Statistics
highlights.description: Opt-in to share anonymous data to help improve the tool without compromising your privacy.

highlights.title: Multi-Language Support
highlights.description: The extension is now available in multiple languages, making it accessible to a broader audience.
